text.arabic:
اللّهُمَّ اسْقِـنا غَيْـثاً مُغيـثاً مَريئاً مُريـعاً،
نافِعـاً غَيْـرَ ضار،
عاجِـلاً غَـيْرَ آجِل
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma ‘asqinā ghaythan mughīthan marī'an murī`a,
nāfi`an ghayra ḍārr,
`ājilan ghayra ājil.

translations.en: O Allah, shower upon us abundant rain, beneficial not harmful, swiftly and not delayed.

items.reference: Abu Dawud 1/303. See also Al-Albani SahihAbu Dawud 1/216.

text.arabic:
اللّهُمَّ أغِثْنـا،
اللّهُمَّ أغِثْنـا،
اللّهُمَّ أغِثْنـا
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma aghithnā,
Allāhumma aghithnā,
Allāhumma aghithnā.

translations.en:
O Allah, send us rain.
O Allah, send us rain.
O Allah, send us rain.

text.arabic:
اللّهُمَّ اسْقِ عِبادَكَ وَبَهـائِمَك،
وَانْشُـرْ رَحْمَـتَكَ
وَأَحْيِي بَلَـدَكَ المَيِّـت
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma’sqi `ibādaka wa bahā'imak,
wanshur raḥmatak,
wa aḥyi baladaka ‘l-mayyit

translations.en:
O Allah, give water to Your slaves, and Your livestock,
and spread Your mercy,
and revive Your dead land.

items.reference: Abu Dawud 1/305. Al-Albani graded it good in Sahih Abu Dawud 1/218.
